goal: Phase 2 source/catalog snapshot model for Orun (component catalog)

notes: Phase 2 Milestone C0 ✅ shipped via PR #168 (squash 7f3f2bf) on 2026-05-31. internal/catalogmodel + sourcectx skeleton, canonical encoder, JSON Schema generator + verify-generated drift gate, golden roundtrip, T-IDK-1/3/5 property tests.

Phase 2 Milestone C1 ✅ shipped via PR #169 (squash b50d799) on 2026-05-31. internal/sourcectx resolver online — ResolveSourceSnapshot(ctx, opts) populates headRevision/treeHash/dirtyHash/catalogInputHash via injected Git/Clock/Filesystem adapters. Verifier-attached fix pinned catalogmodel coverage floor deterministically.

Phase 2 Milestone C2 PR-1 ✅ shipped via PR #170 (squash 723be32) on 2026-05-31. internal/catalogresolve.DiscoverAndLoad(ctx, Options) online — workspace walk + schema-validated load + intent-defaults inheritance → deterministic []AuthoredManifest with RFC 6901 provenance. Coverage 90.0% deterministic. Convention adopted: 'one additive file per cross-package contract surface in catalogmodel/, no edits to existing source files'.

Phase 2 Milestone C2 PR-2 implemented via PR #171 (branch task-0026-catalogresolve-c2-pr2 @ 9c65e7c) on 2026-05-31. Top-level Resolve(ctx, opts) (*ResolvedCatalog, []ValidationIssue, error) covering resolution-pipeline stages 4 (infer) / 5+6 (validate) / 7 (assemble) / 8 (deps) / 9 (validate post-deps) / 10 (manifestHash). T-RES-1, T-RES-2, ErrDependencyMissing, deploy-after-cycle, calls-cycle, strict-mode promotion all exercised. Coverage internal/catalogresolve 90.2% (gate ≥ 90%, +0.2pp headroom over PR-1). All required CI checks SUCCESS at handoff (Orun Plan, Harness dry-run guard, test); mergeable=MERGEABLE, mergeStateStatus=CLEAN. Awaiting Task 0027 verifier per ai/tasks/task-0027-verifier.md. On PASS merges PR #171 and closes Milestone C2.

C3+ roadmap: C3 = CatalogSnapshot + graph builder + catalogHash (1 PR per implementation-plan.md §C3); C4 = catalogstore Writer/Resolver atomic writes (2–3 PRs); C5 = catalog CLI; C6 = orun plan integration; C7 = orun run integration + history events; C8 = catalogdiff/validate/rebuild; C9 = catalogsync seam (Syncer interface + NoopSyncer ONLY — no HTTP, no auth, no DB schema).
Phase 2 is local-only. No HTTP, no SaaS, no DB schema. internal/catalogsync ships only the Syncer interface and a NoopSyncer.
Phase 1 invariants preserved: do not rename Phase 1 fields, do not lower coverage floors, do not remove preserved CLI workflows.

Carry-forward (deferred from Phase 1, candidates for follow-on within Phase 2 scope): MirrorModeHardlink debug-fold decision, RunnerHooks.AfterStateUpdate async-mirror evaluation, --persist-revision flag wiring, Option B trigger-name resolver branch (ai/proposals/task-0019-spec-update.md), --prune-legacy.
